text:
Created attachment 239112
Patch to update audio/grip to 4.2.4

Hi,

I've created a patch to update audio/grip to version 4.2.4.

Changelog
=========

- Translation updates: Hungarian
- New translation: Romanian
- Store fgetc() return value in int for comparison with EOF
- Translation updates: Italian

Kind regards,

Jens
